reviewsSummary.note: Feature reviews not performed because validators failed

blockingIssues.description: RunPage.tsx has a JSX syntax error at line 154: 'JSX expressions must have one parent element'. This breaks TypeScript compilation, ESLint, and production build. The file likely has a malformed JSX return statement where multiple top-level elements are returned without a fragment wrapper.

Frontend tests fail with 13 failures. Key issues: (1) Layout.test.tsx breadcrumb test finds duplicate 'History' text from both nav-link and breadcrumb, (2) PersonaDiffPage.test.tsx finds multiple 'Checkout Flow' elements, (3) ReportPage.test.tsx has similar duplicate element issues. Tests use getByText which requires unique matches - tests need to use getAllByText or more specific selectors.

Backend lint (ruff) reports 36 errors across 7 files. Most are I001 (import sorting, auto-fixable), but also includes B008 (Depends() in defaults), F401 (unused imports), SIM105, N806, C420, DTZ005, RUF046. 24 are auto-fixable with --fix.

Backend mypy reports 119 errors in 12 files. Major categories: missing type parameters for generic types (dict, list) throughout browser.py and nova_act_browser.py; no-untyped-def for many functions in browser.py; call-overload errors in taxonomy.py where dict.get() is called with plain str instead of Literal types; missing named arguments in nova_act_browser.py Pydantic model constructors.
